name: NIKKE RPG
description:
This is my first ever bot so give me some slack.

This bot is my attempt of a NIKKE goddess of victory rpg where you can be anything from a NIKKE, commander, heretic, rapture controlled NIKKE. It’s all up to you.

Leave a comment if there’s anything wrong with the bot, concerns, or general advice for a noob bot maker.
creator: IDKchatter
